summary: Master’s student at USTO-MB in Artificial Intelligence with strong focus on software engineering fundamentals, algorithms, system design, and applied machine learning projects.

duties.title: Academic Software Development
duties.description: Designed and implemented academic projects focusing on clean architecture, modular design, and algorithmic problem-solving.

duties.title: Machine Learning & AI Projects
duties.description: Built and evaluated machine learning models for classification, prediction, and data analysis tasks.

duties.title: Systems & Networking Fundamentals
duties.description: Studied operating systems, networking concepts, and distributed systems foundations through practical labs and simulations.

achievements.title: Final Year AI Project
achievements.description: Designed and implemented an AI-based solution as a graduation project, including data preprocessing, model training, and evaluation.
achievements.impact: Demonstrated ability to transform theoretical AI concepts into a functional, end-to-end system.

achievements.title: Algorithm Optimization & Problem Solving
achievements.description: Developed optimized solutions for algorithmic and data structure problems across multiple academic assignments.
achievements.impact: Strengthened analytical thinking and performance-oriented coding skills.

achievements.title: Collaborative Team Projects
achievements.description: Worked in small teams to design and deliver software projects, applying version control and structured development workflows.
achievements.impact: Improved teamwork, code collaboration, and project organization skills.

systems.name: AI Graduation Project
systems.description: End-to-end machine learning system developed as part of the master’s thesis.

systems.name: Academic Management System Project
systems.description: Full-stack or backend-focused academic project simulating a real-world management platform.
